MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference:
Moira McQuaid, ESQ. of Law Offices of Moira C. McQuaid, Tel:(650) 638-2317 for plaintiff.
Kurt Bockes, ESQ. of LITTLER MENDELSON, P.C. Tel:(415) 677-4095 for defendant.

Hearing is held. Defendant counsel contests the tentative ruling. Matter argued and submitted. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FLIGHT CENTRE TRAVEL GROUP (USA) INC. MOTION TO TRANSFER is taken under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***An order Denying defendant FLIGHT Centre Travel Group (USA), Inc.'s Motion to transfer venue signed after the hearing.***
